ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO country code */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO country code */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the jurisdiction based on FSI */,
  "fsi_value" REAL /* Financial Secrecy Index (FSI) value */,
  "fsi_share" REAL /* Share of the global scale weight */,
  "global_scale_weight" REAL /* Global scale weight */,
  "secrecy_score" REAL /* Secrecy score */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the jurisdiction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional information about the jurisdiction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jurisdictions_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES jurisdiction_regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "fsi_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the FSI indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FSI indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the FSI indicator */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the FSI indicator in the overall FSI calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fsi_indicators_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES fsi_indicator_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdiction_fsi" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FSI indicator */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the FSI indicator for the jurisdiction */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the FSI value is applicable */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the FSI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the jurisdiction data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analysis) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdiction_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fsi_indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
column_names: Ranking of the jurisdiction based on FSI
Share of the global scale weight
Weight of the FSI indicator in the overall FSI calculation
Value of the FSI indicator for the jurisdiction
Year for which the FSI value is applicable
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the jurisdiction whose data was accessed
ID of the user accessing the data
Date when the jurisdiction data was accessed
Type of access (e.g., view, download, analysis)
IP address of the user accessing the data
User agent (browser, device) of the user accessing the data
